orderCreated.title: New order
orderCreated.body: A buyer created an order. It will move to work after payment.

orderPaidSeller.title: Order paid
orderPaidSeller.body: The buyer paid for the order. You can start working on it.

orderPaidBuyer.title: Payment in escrow
orderPaidBuyer.body: Funds are reserved until delivery is confirmed.

orderStarted.title: Order in progress
orderStarted.body: The seller started working on your order.

orderDelivered.title: Order delivered
orderDelivered.body: Check the result and confirm delivery if everything is fine.

orderCompleted.title: Deal completed
orderCompleted.body: The buyer confirmed delivery. Funds were released to the seller.

orderAutoReleased.title: Deal completed automatically
orderAutoReleased.body: The confirmation window expired. Funds were released to the seller.

orderDisputed.title: Dispute opened
orderDisputed.body: A dispute was opened for the order. An admin will review the deal history.

disputeResolved.title: Dispute resolved
disputeResolved.bodyRefund: The admin resolved the dispute in favor of a refund.
disputeResolved.bodyRelease: The admin resolved the dispute in favor of the seller payout.
